/usr/bin/g++ CMakeFiles/test_snn.dir/tests/test_snn.c.o -o test_snn  libsnn.a -lcudart -lm /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/11/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl  -L"/usr/local/cuda-12.8/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs" -L"/usr/local/cuda-12.8/targets/x86_64-linux/lib"
